scripts.build:frontend: mkdir -p src-frontend/dist && npx esbuild src-frontend/js/entry.js --bundle --minify --outfile=src-frontend/dist/app.min.js && npx esbuild src-frontend/terminal.css --minify --outfile=src-frontend/dist/terminal.css && cp src-frontend/index.dist.html src-frontend/dist/index.html && cp src-frontend/lightweight-charts.js src-frontend/dist/lightweight-charts.js
